title: Post-Exam Reflection Practices and Future Preparation Improvement Survey
description: This survey measures how consistently a student reflects after exams and uses those reflections to improve future preparation.
questionnaire_notice: Choose the option that best matches your usual behavior after receiving exam results. Lower scores indicate stronger reflection habits.

questions.prompt: How often do you review the questions or tasks you answered incorrectly after an exam?
How consistently do you identify the reason behind each mistake you made?
How often do you compare your exam result with your original study plan?
How often do you write down lessons learned for the next exam?
How likely are you to change your revision schedule after seeing an exam result?
How often do you identify topics that need deeper practice for the next exam?
How regularly do you ask for feedback from a teacher or classmate after an exam?
How often do you reflect on whether time management affected your exam performance?
How often do you change your note-taking or revision method after an exam?
How consistently do you set clear goals for the next exam based on the previous one?
How often do you review which preparation habits worked well and which did not?
How often do you revisit difficult exam questions until you understand the correct approach?
How likely are you to create a step-by-step improvement plan after receiving results?
How often do you think about how stress or emotions affected your preparation and performance?
How consistently do you apply what you learned from one exam to the next preparation cycle?

results.label: Excellent reflection routine
results.message: You reflect after exams very consistently and translate those insights into strong future preparation.

results.label: Strong reflection habits
results.message: Your reflection habits are well developed. A little more structure could make them even more effective.

results.label: Developing reflection practice
results.message: You show useful reflection behaviors, but they are not always consistent. More regular review would improve future preparation.

results.label: Limited reflection use
results.message: You reflect sometimes, but the process is irregular. Written notes, feedback, and action planning would help you improve more clearly.

results.label: Very low reflection routine
results.message: Reflection is currently very limited. Start with a simple post-exam routine: review mistakes, identify causes, and set clear actions for the next exam.
